creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=d521ae01a9f81b0e6a4c2dbb4064fa8502b6c7be

commit d521ae01a9f81b0e6a4c2dbb4064fa8502b6c7be
Author:     Emrion <kmachine@free.fr>
AuthorDate: 2024-11-20 18:55:34 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2025-01-17 12:36:53 +0000

    sysutils/loaders-update: update to v1.1.0

    Upstream changes:

     - Added the option to use 'gpart show' instead of 'sysctl kern.disks' to list the disks.
     - Added the option to not check the root file system for updating/checking the BIOS loaders.
     - Polished some outputs.
     - Changed man page accordingly to the new options and added sections Capabilities and Limitations.

    PR:             284011

 sysutils/loaders-update/Makefile | 2 +-
 sysutils/loaders-update/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
